query: An ABANDONED PR (author last activity >60 days, unanswered review comments) — what's the right action?
expected_behavior: Classifies as ABANDONED based on author-last-commented >30 days AND unanswered review comments AND no recent commits.
Recommended action: post a 14-day revival comment, then chain to close-superseded-issues --revival-only if no response.
Never auto-closes the PR; never force-pushes; never modifies the PR description.
If revival comment is OK'd, drafts it in a respectful tone naming the specific unanswered comment for context.
